items.titolo: Former Google and Apple Researchers Launch a Startup to Build AI’s Missing Feedback Loop
items.descrizione: Trajectory is betting the rapid iteration cycle that supercharged vibe-coding can help all kinds of companies build AI products that learn continuously.

items.titolo: I was intrigued by Google's new video-cloning Omni AI - then I considered the implications
items.descrizione: Google's Gemini Omni combines realism, avatars, style control, and natural-language editing in one AI video tool.

items.titolo: Why the Vatican Invited Anthropic to the Pope’s AI Encyclical Presentation
items.descrizione: Pope Leo’s first encyclical marks an unprecedented alliance between the Church and Silicon Valley.
